en.description_en: A tangible cultural property and historic site comprising a public notice board (seisatsu) and the site of the Ashizawa Hanatate notice-board station. Municipally designated by Tamura City on 2006-07-10. Located at Funehiki-machi Ashizawa, Hanatate-mae and vicinity.

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of a reduced cadastral map of Ashizawa Village, Tamura District, in the Fourth Greater District, Lesser Fourth District of the former Iwasaki Prefecture administration. Municipally designated by Tamura City on 2008-11-25. Located at Funehiki-machi Funehiki, Minami-motomachi.
A tangible cultural property consisting of a double-mouthed earthenware vessel. Municipally designated by Tamura City on 2008-11-25. Located at Funehiki-machi Funehiki, Minami-motomachi.

A tangible cultural property consisting of a small gilt-bronze Buddhist image known as the armored buddha (yoroibutsu). Municipally designated by Tamura City on 2008-11-25. Located at Funehiki-machi Funehiki, Minami-motomachi.

An intangible folk cultural property in the form of the Hatanaka grand kagura (daikagura). Municipally designated by Tamura City on 2011-02-23. Located at Takine-machi Sugaya, Hatanaka.
